languages.text: "Юнификация... Рискованное, чрезвычайно трудоемкое создание симбиоза между идентичными индивидуумами. Я полагал, это легендарная технология, считающаяся утерянной. Быть может она могла бы стать ключом к сотворению Триасоматы... Мне жаль, что мы встретились лишь сейчас, на твоем смертном одре". {n}Эоганн неотрывно наблюдает за техножрицей.{/n}

"Unification... A risky, extremely laborious creation of symbiosis between identical individuals. I believed it to be a legendary technology, deemed lost. Perhaps it could have been the key to the creation of the Triasomata... I regret that we have only met now, upon your deathbed." {n}Eogunn watches the Tech-Priest without looking away.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Юнификация... Рискованное, чрезвычайно трудоемкое создание симбиоза между идентичными индивидуумами. Я полагал, это легендарная технология, считающаяся утерянной. Быть может она могла бы стать ключом к сотворению Триасоматы... Мне жаль, что мы встретились лишь сейчас, на твоем смертном одре". {n}Эоганн неотрывно наблюдает за техножрицей.{/n}

languages.text: «Unificación... Una creación simbiótica laboriosa entre individuos idénticos. Creía que se trataba de una tecnología mitológica, dada por perdida. Tal vez hubiera sido la clave de la creación del triasómata... Lamento que solo nos hayamos conocido en su lecho de muerte». {n}Eogunn observa fijamente a la tecnosacerdotisa.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Unification... A risky, extremely laborious creation of symbiosis between identical individuals. I believed it to be a legendary technology, deemed lost. Perhaps it could have been the key to the creation of the Triasomata... I regret that we have only met now, upon your deathbed." {n}Eogunn watches the Tech-Priest without looking away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Unificación... Una creación simbiótica laboriosa entre individuos idénticos. Creía que se trataba de una tecnología mitológica, dada por perdida. Tal vez hubiera sido la clave de la creación del triasómata... Lamento que solo nos hayamos conocido en su lecho de muerte. {n}Eogunn observa fijamente a la tecnosacerdotisa.{/n}

languages.text: “融合……一种用以在相同个体间创造出共生体的技术，风险极高且极其繁复。我曾以为这只是早已失传的传奇技术。也许它本可以成为创造三相体的关键……可惜，偏偏是在你临终之际，我才得以见到你。”{n}伊奥贡目不转睛地注视着那位技术神甫。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Unification... A risky, extremely laborious creation of symbiosis between identical individuals. I believed it to be a legendary technology, deemed lost. Perhaps it could have been the key to the creation of the Triasomata... I regret that we have only met now, upon your deathbed." {n}Eogunn watches the Tech-Priest without looking away.{/n}

languages.text: "Einigung ... Eine riskante, extrem aufwendige Kreation aus der Symbiose zweier identischer Individuen. Ich hielt sie für eine verloren geglaubte legendäre Technologie. Vielleicht hätte sie der Schlüssel für die Schaffung des Triasomata sein können ... Ich bedauere, dass wir uns erst jetzt treffen, auf Eurem Totenbett." {n}Eogunn beobachtet den Techpriester, ohne den Blick abzuwenden.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Unification... A risky, extremely laborious creation of symbiosis between identical individuals. I believed it to be a legendary technology, deemed lost. Perhaps it could have been the key to the creation of the Triasomata... I regret that we have only met now, upon your deathbed." {n}Eogunn watches the Tech-Priest without looking away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Einigung ... Eine riskante, extrem aufwendige Kreation aus der Symbiose zweier identischer Individuen. Ich hielt sie für eine verloren geglaubte legendäre Technologie. Vielleicht hätte sie der Schlüssel für die Schaffung des Triasomata sein können ... Ich bedauere, dass wir uns erst jetzt treffen, auf Eurem Totenbett." {n}Eogunn beobachtet den Techpriester, ohne den Blick abzuwenden.{/n}

languages.text: « L'unification... La création risquée et extrêmement laborieuse d'une symbiose entre des individus identiques. Je pensais que c'était une technologie légendaire perdue dans les limbes de l'histoire, mais peut-être est-ce la clé de l'élaboration du Triasomata... Je regrette que nous ne nous rencontrions que maintenant, sur votre lit de mort. » {n}Eogunn observe la technoprêtresse sans détourner le regard un seul instant.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Unification... A risky, extremely laborious creation of symbiosis between identical individuals. I believed it to be a legendary technology, deemed lost. Perhaps it could have been the key to the creation of the Triasomata... I regret that we have only met now, upon your deathbed." {n}Eogunn watches the Tech-Priest without looking away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « L'unification... La création risquée et extrêmement laborieuse d'une symbiose entre des individus identiques. Je pensais que c'était une technologie légendaire perdue dans les limbes de l'histoire, mais peut-être est-ce la clé de l'élaboration du Triasomata... Je regrette que nous ne nous rencontrions que maintenant, sur votre lit de mort. » {n}Eogunn observe la technoprêtresse sans détourner le regard un seul instant.{/n}

languages.text: "Birleşme... Özdeş bireyler arasında riskli, son derece zahmetli bir ortakyaşam yaratımı. Bunun kaybolduğu düşünülen efsanevi bir teknoloji olduğuna inanıyordum. Belki de Üçyeköz'ün yaratılmasının anahtarı olabilirdi... Sizinle ancak ölüm döşeğinizde tanışmış olduğumuz için üzgünüm." {n}Eogunn, bakışlarını kaçırmadan Tekno Rahip'i izliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Unification... A risky, extremely laborious creation of symbiosis between identical individuals. I believed it to be a legendary technology, deemed lost. Perhaps it could have been the key to the creation of the Triasomata... I regret that we have only met now, upon your deathbed." {n}Eogunn watches the Tech-Priest without looking away.{/n}

Belki de Üçyeköz'ün yaratılmasının anahtarı olabilirdi... Sizinle ancak ölüm döşeğinizde tanışmış olduğumuz için üzgünüm." {n}Eogunn, bakışlarını kaçırmadan Tekno Rahip'i izliyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「統一…同一の個体同士の共生を極めて危険で非常に労力を要する創造。伝説の技術とされ、失われたと信じられていた。それがトリアスオマタの創造の鍵であったかもしれない。君と出会えたのは、君の死床のときだけだった。残念だ。」{n}エオグンはテクプリストを見つめ続ける.{/n}

Perhaps it could have been the key to the creation of the Triasomata... I regret that we have only met now, upon your deathbed." {n}Eogunn watches the Tech-Priest without looking away.{/n}
